# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('staging-sql-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL logical server."
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "stagingdb",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL database."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure region for the deployment."
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "sqladmin",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL administrator login."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "defaultValue": "AzureSQL2024!"
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Database SKU."
      }
    },
    "devIpRules": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [
        {
          "name": "DevIP1",
          "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
          "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
        }
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of development IP firewall rules. Replace with your actual IPs."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "serverName": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
    "databaseName": "[parameters('databaseName')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[variables('serverName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
          "name": "AllowAzureServices",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
            "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
          "copy": {
            "name": "devIpRulesCopy",
            "count": "[length(parameters('devIpRules'))]"
          },
          "name": "[parameters('devIpRules')[copyIndex('devIpRulesCopy')].name]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "[parameters('devIpRules')[copyIndex('devIpRulesCopy')].startIpAddress]",
            "endIpAddress": "[parameters('devIpRules')[copyIndex('devIpRulesCopy')].endIpAddress]"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(variables('serverName'), '/', variables('databaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('skuName')]",
        "tier": "Basic",
        "capacity": 5
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": 2147483648,
        "sampleName": "AdventureWorksLT"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('databaseName')]"
    }
  }
}
